# Reconciliation Checklist: Work Item Scoped Fetch Service

**Purpose**: Validate that feature requirements and planning artifacts define how repository-truth reconciliation is performed, evidenced, and maintained over time.
**Created**: 2026-05-16
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are explicit requirements defined for what qualifies as acceptable task-completion evidence (code paths, test assets, docs updates, command results) for each completed task entry? [Completeness, Tasks §Phases 1-7, Gap]
- [ ] CHK002 Does the spec or plan define a required evidence format when a task is marked complete but associated outputs are deferred, moved, or partially failing? [Completeness, Tasks §Phase 6 T028-T029, Gap]
- [ ] CHK003 Are reconciliation requirements defined for mapping planned file paths to renamed or relocated repository paths? [Completeness, Plan §Source Code, Tasks §T001-T021, Gap]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements defined for recording when checklist conclusions depend on repository inspection outside spec/plan/tasks? [Completeness, Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is the term "resolved" in discrepancy tracking defined with objective evidence thresholds rather than narrative-only statements? [Clarity, discrepancies.md §D-001..D-004, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK006 Is "all resolved" scoped clearly (document-level vs repository-level truth) so readers can determine whether unresolved implementation drift is still possible? [Clarity, discrepancies.md §Status, Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK007 Are acceptance statements that imply bounded memory or caller refactors paired with clearly defined evidence artifacts to demonstrate completion claims? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003/FR-009/FR-010, Tasks §Checkpoints]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK008 Do spec status, plan status, and task completion state use a consistent lifecycle model (e.g., Draft vs Complete vs Implemented) without contradiction? [Consistency, Spec line 5, Plan line 3, Tasks §all phases]
- [ ] CHK009 Are planned source/test file locations consistent with current repository structure expectations documented elsewhere in later specs? [Consistency, Plan §Project Structure, Spec 021.2 references to IWorkItemFetchService]
- [ ] CHK010 Are dependency assertions between features 015 and 016 consistent across prerequisite declarations, assumptions, and implementation notes? [Consistency, Spec §Depends on/Assumptions, Spec 016 §Prerequisite]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK011 Are success criteria for "zero direct GetWorkItemsAsync calls" accompanied by measurable reconciliation criteria that define where and how this is audited over time? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-002, Gap]
- [ ] CHK012 Are pass/fail thresholds defined for "pre-existing failures" so completion evidence cannot be accepted without explicit risk disposition? [Measurability, Tasks §T028, Gap]
- [ ] CHK013 Can each completed documentation-sync task be objectively traced to a specific document delta reference (section, commit, or revision marker)? [Measurability, Tasks §T022-T025, Traceability]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK014 Are requirements defined for reconciliation when task checkboxes indicate done but repository artifacts have been moved, renamed, or split across modules? [Coverage, Alternate Flow, Gap]
- [ ] CHK015 Are supersession scenarios covered, including how a later spec can override earlier dispositions without losing audit trace to the original requirement? [Coverage, Spec 029 §Clarifications, Spec 031 §D10, Gap]
- [ ] CHK016 Are requirements defined for incomplete-evidence scenarios (e.g., partial test failures, deferred versioning actions, out-of-scope ops tasks) and their required annotation format? [Coverage, Exception Flow, Spec 031 §Versioning actions, Tasks §T028]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK017 Is there a defined requirement for handling contradictory evidence between checklist assertions and current repository state discovered after checklist creation? [Edge Case, Conflict, Gap]
- [ ] CHK018 Are requirements defined for stale path references inherited from historical architecture layouts so reviewers know whether they are acceptable aliases or specification defects? [Edge Case, Plan §Source Code, Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK019 Are assumptions about later-spec supersession conventions explicitly documented for this feature (e.g., replacement rule, rationale, and backlink requirements)? [Assumption, Spec 029 §Session 2026-05-03, Spec 031 §D10]
- [ ] CHK020 Is a dependency defined for maintaining cross-document consistency among spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, and checklist outputs after downstream feature updates? [Dependency, Gap]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK021 Is there a requirement that unresolved ambiguities be captured as "incomplete evidence notes" rather than silently treated as complete? [Ambiguity, Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 Are conflict-resolution rules specified for when discrepancy logs declare "resolved" but later specs classify related decisions as deferred or superseded? [Conflict, discrepancies.md §Status, Spec 031 §Versioning actions]

## Reconciliation outcome (2026-05-16)

- Incomplete task IDs confirmed: `T013`, `T021`, `T028`, `T029`.
- Complete/superseded task IDs confirmed: `T001`, `T002`, `T003`, `T004`, `T005`, `T006`, `T009`, `T010`, `T012`, `T017`, `T019`, `T030`.
- Primary supersession sources: `specs/021.2-separation-of-concerns`, `specs/014-field-filter-scope`.
